name: CERN Science Gateway
description: Visit the world's largest particle physics laboratory near Geneva.
longDescription: Visit the Science Gateway at CERN, designed by Renzo Piano. Explore interactive exhibitions about the universe, particle physics, and the Large Hadron Collider. Book a free guided tour to see actual CERN facilities and learn about groundbreaking discoveries like the Higgs boson.

providers.name: CERN (Science Gateway)
providers.description: Free admission to all permanent exhibitions

providers.name: CERN (Guided Tour)
providers.description: Free guided tour of CERN facilities — must book in advance

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's biggest activities marketplace — verified suppliers, free cancellation
